title: Implement Kill Switch + Rollback Documentation
description: Add config-level kill switch to ChatService. When enabled, all responses return immediate abstention. Includes toggle CLI script and rollback procedure documentation.
acceptance_criteria: LaunchControlsConfig schema added to system_config.py with kill_switch_enabled + force_abstain_message
ChatService.answer() and stream_answer_sse() check kill switch at entry, before any other processing
Kill switch response uses mode='kill_switch', model='none', citations=[], Chinese message
scripts/toggle_kill_switch.py supports --enable/--disable/--status with advisory file lock
ROLLBACK_PROCEDURE.md exists in project root with step-by-step instructions
Config read failure defaults to kill_switch_enabled=False (fail-open)
implementation_steps: 3. Add kill switch check at start of ChatService.answer() and stream_answer_sse()
